tool.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
tool.description: Production successor to Swarm for agentic OpenAI workflows with broader model support.
tool.statusNote: OpenAI Swarm was replaced by the Agents SDK.
tool.logoNotes: OpenAI does not expose a standalone public Agents SDK logo on the official guide page; this uses the owner-controlled OpenAI developer favicon (`/favicon.svg`) as a compact service icon for the SDK surface rather than claiming a separate canonical vendor wordmark.
tool.practitionerNote: Fast path for OpenAI-centric agent builds, though portability and provider concentration should be weighed before making it a platform default.

dataResidency.detail: Library is self-hosted, but built-in tracing sends run data to OpenAI's platform unless disabled.

deployment.detail: pip-installed SDK (self-hosted); API calls go to OpenAI's hosted endpoints.

auditLogging.detail: Hosted tracing logs runs to OpenAI's platform; self-hosted logging is operator-implemented.

soc2.detail: Self-hosted library; SOC 2 applies to the operator's infrastructure, not the package.

iso27001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 27001 applies to the operator's ISMS, not the package.

iso42001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 42001 applies to the deploying organisation.

euAiAct.detail: Developer component, not an AI system placed on the market; obligations rest with the deployer.
